Cursor iteration regression in 6.8.0 where not all documents returned; cursor spec area.

Performance-only improvement to BSON serialization hot paths, no behavioral change.

Documentation link cleanup, no behavior change.

Internal refactor to remove symbol class properties, 'No change' to user experience.

First implementation for DRIVERS-2757 to retry DNS failures; depends on cross-driver spec work.
Adds a command logging test for unacknowledged writes; split from DRIVERS-2525, test infrastructure work.

CI plumbing for coverage tasks ('download-and-merge-coverage'), unrelated to driver behavior.

Bundling/polyfill issue with utils/types import in mongo_logger, packaging concern not spec behavior.

Unhandled promise rejection in KMS proxy socket setup, internal code quality issue not spec conformance.
